entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS APPROACH
entities.description: A strategy for improving diets by analyzing the entire food system

entities.name: DIETS
entities.description: The food and drink consumed by people, which the food systems approach aims to improve

entities.name: METRICS
entities.description: A comprehensive set of measures used to characterize food systems, set goals, track performance, and evaluate interventions

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex network of activities and actors involved in the production, processing, distribution, and consumption of food

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEM INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Actions taken to change or improve specific aspects of a food system

entities.name: ANALYTICAL FRAMEWORK
entities.description: An updated structure used to identify systematically relevant metrics and indicators

entities.name: LOW AND MIDDLE INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where data availability for food system metrics is being analyzed

entities.name: PUBLIC DATA
entities.description: Data available to the general public used to monitor food system drivers and outcomes

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEM DRIVERS
entities.description: Factors that influence the functioning and performance of food systems

entities.name: OUTCOMES
entities.description: The results or effects produced by food system activities and drivers

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEM ACTIVITIES
entities.description: The specific actions and processes within a food system

entities.name: SURVEYS
entities.description: Tools used for data collection that can be extended to cover required food system data

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Global goals that share overlapping indicators with food system metrics

relationships.description: indicators based on data availability in
